div.head: 232. Letter From Secretary of State Kissinger to Egyptian President SadatSource: National Archives, RG 59, Records of Henry Kissinger, 1973–77, Box 15, Miscellaneous Documents, Telegrams, etc., 1975, Folder 8. Secret.
div.p: I have the honor to transmit to you the text which follows of a letter to Your Excellency from the President of the United States:

In connection with Article VII of the Agreement between Egypt and Israel, the United States’ understanding of the word non-military is that it excludes all types of weapons, weapons systems, ammunition, missiles and armor. It does not exclude economic items such as raw materials, oil and other civilian cargo. The Government of Israel has as
sured me that it will carry out this Article in accordance with the above definition.
President of the Arab Republic of Egypt”
The signed original of this letter will be forwarded to Your Excellency.

signed.note: The original bears this typed signature.
